description: Present introductory medical image processing and analysis techniques. Topics include medical imaging formats, segmentation, registration, image quantification, classification.  Strongly encourage Matlab experience, such asCOMP SCI 310or368-Matlab.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (MATH 320or340) and (STAT 511,541,POP HLTH/​B M I  551,STAT 324,371, orSTAT/​F&W ECOL  571) or graduate/professional standing
